src: A fluffy cat with white and brown fur, featuring tabby stripes. Its green eyes contrast its white face. The cat has pointed ears, tucked paws, a full bushy tail with a dark tip, and a pale pink nose.
edit: A blocky Minecraft figure of a small animal, made of voxel-style cubes. It has a square face with green eyes, gray and white body blocks, a pink nose, cubic ears, angular whiskers, and a cube tail, in a pixelated aesthetic.

per_image_non_shared_src.zhang-kaiyv-IUl-bSx28WU-unsplash: The cat is crouched low on a red carpet with wide eyes. In the background, there's a blurred large red column on a smooth floor.
per_image_non_shared_src.zhang-kaiyv-NJDi7dUlpNk-unsplash: The cat is partly hidden behind a large textured tree trunk, head tilted to the left. Background has a faded beige wall and a slightly out-of-focus floor.
per_image_non_shared_src.zhang-kaiyv-S3mP4s-JKGM-unsplash: The cat is sitting upright on a narrow ledge, with a background of a stone wall in shades of gray and some green moss along the edges near the floor.
per_image_non_shared_src.zhang-kaiyv-iOoCYbsNYDE-unsplash: The cat is sitting on its haunches near a brick ledge, looking upward. Green leaves sprout from the soil beside it, and a wide arched brick wall fills the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.zhang-kaiyv-iXheXK4YeAk-unsplash: The cat walks along a rough-textured stone wall with deep mortar lines and stepped recesses, viewed while looking upward.
per_image_non_shared_src.zhang-kaiyv-ixVJDSLuLlM-unsplash: The cat walks towards the viewer, ears perked and eyes focused. In the background, a large stone wall with mortar lines stands, with a path on the left.
per_image_non_shared_src.zhang-kaiyv-n9u7QS4HrT4-unsplash: Cat partially concealed by a large textured object, only eyes and top of head visible, with blurred earthy colors creating shadow and light in background.
per_image_non_shared_src.zhang-kaiyv-tw4R1Qq5TpQ-unsplash: The cat sits upright against a dark blue and red wooden panel door, looking forward. The door is slightly elevated from the ground with a rustic, uneven base.
per_image_non_shared_src.zhang-kaiyv-vvk9olEKQo8-unsplash: A cat sits with its head tilted upward, watching intently, against a background with stepped concrete platforms and blurred lines suggesting a structure, contributing to a sense of height.

per_image_non_shared_edit.zhang-kaiyv-IUl-bSx28WU-unsplash: The cat is crouched low on a snow-dusted carpet. In the background, there is a blurred vertical icy blue column on a polished, snow-covered floor, capturing a serene winter scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.zhang-kaiyv-NJDi7dUlpNk-unsplash: A cat is peeking from behind a snow-covered tree trunk, head tilted left under frost. In the background, a beige wall glazed with ice. The slightly out-of-focus floor is dusted with snow, depicting a winter landscape.
per_image_non_shared_edit.zhang-kaiyv-S3mP4s-JKGM-unsplash: A cat sits upright on a narrow ledge with a snow-dusted stone wall background in icy gray. Snowflakes cling to rough textures with green moss patches contrasting the frozen landscape.
per_image_non_shared_edit.zhang-kaiyv-iOoCYbsNYDE-unsplash: The cat sits on its haunches near a snow-dusted brick ledge, looking upward. Frost-tipped evergreen leaves grow from the soil beside it. A wide arched brick wall with frost is in the background, under gentle winter light.
per_image_non_shared_edit.zhang-kaiyv-iXheXK4YeAk-unsplash: A thick, fluffy-coated cat walks carefully along a frosty stone wall. It gazes upward at drifting snowflakes. The wall has icy frames, dusted mortar lines, and icicles in recesses catching faint winter light, creating depth in a serene winter scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.zhang-kaiyv-ixVJDSLuLlM-unsplash: A cat walks through snow towards the viewer, its ears perked and eyes glistening. In the background, a stone wall is partially covered in frost. A faint snowy path meanders to the left.
per_image_non_shared_edit.zhang-kaiyv-n9u7QS4HrT4-unsplash: A cat is partially concealed by a large snow-covered mound, with only its eyes and the top of its head visible. The background has blurred tones of whites, blues, and icy grays, creating a shadowy winter scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.zhang-kaiyv-tw4R1Qq5TpQ-unsplash: The cat sits upright against a snow-covered dark blue and red wooden panel door. The door is slightly elevated from the snow-laden ground with a rustic, uneven base.
per_image_non_shared_edit.zhang-kaiyv-vvk9olEKQo8-unsplash: The cat is sitting with its head tilted upward. In the background are stepped concrete platforms dusted with snow and silhouettes of barren trees against a wintry landscape with faint mist.
